subject: refactor(ui): replace custom components with DaisyUI 5 equivalents
body:
Migrate hand-rolled UI patterns to DaisyUI component classes for
consistency, better accessibility, and reduced custom code.

- 4 modals → DaisyUI modal + native <dialog> (focus trap, Escape, ::backdrop)
- CollapsibleSection → collapse collapse-arrow (checkbox-controlled)
- SaveLoadModal tabs → tabs tabs-border
- SaveLoadModal/InstallInstructions errors → alert alert-error/warning alert-soft
- Toast → toast (container) + alert (item styling)
- ExportButtons progress → progress progress-primary
- DebugPill counts → badge badge-error/warning
- Shortcuts keys → kbd kbd-sm + divider
- Removed unused bg-gradient-creative utility

Tags: ui, daisyui, components, modal, collapse, toast, alert, progress, badge, kbd
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: minor
